New Puppy Essentials Checklist: Everything You Need (2026)

Bringing home a new puppy? This checklist covers every essential item you’ll need — from food bowls to crates, toys to training tools.

Before bringing puppy home: preparation checklist

As pet parents ourselves, we know how overwhelming it can be to choose the right products for your furry family member. That’s why we’ve done the hard work for you. In this comprehensive guide, we’ll walk you through everything you need to know so you can make an informed decision with confidence.

Must-have items for the first week

This section covers everything you need to know about must-have items for the first week. We’ve gathered information from veterinary sources, industry experts, and extensive customer reviews to provide you with the most accurate and useful information possible.

This section covers everything you need to know about food and feeding essentials. We’ve gathered information from veterinary sources, industry experts, and extensive customer reviews to provide you with the most accurate and useful information possible.

This section covers everything you need to know about training must-haves. We’ve gathered information from veterinary sources, industry experts, and extensive customer reviews to provide you with the most accurate and useful information possible.

This section covers everything you need to know about health and grooming supplies. We’ve gathered information from veterinary sources, industry experts, and extensive customer reviews to provide you with the most accurate and useful information possible.

This section covers everything you need to know about toys and enrichment items. We’ve gathered information from veterinary sources, industry experts, and extensive customer reviews to provide you with the most accurate and useful information possible.
